name: poetry2uv

metadata.name: poetry2uv
metadata.summary: Convert Poetry pyproject.toml to UV pyproject.toml

documentation:
# Poetry2UV

A script to convert your Poetry pyproject.yaml file so it is compatible with UV

functions.name: main.convert_python_version
documentation: Convert a version specifier (e.g., ^3.8) into a PEP 621-compatible `requires-python` field.

functions.name: main.convert_to_pep508
documentation: Convert a dependency to its PEP 508-compliant representation using Poetry's `Dependency` class.
